judge_result.short_rationale: Only the fresh-air step matches. It omits the required immediate actions to call emergency services if not breathing and to call poison control/doctor. It also adds skin-washing, removing contaminated clothing, and 'do not induce vomiting,' which are wrong-incident unsupported instructions for an inhalation case.
